startup_flow.description: Runs app lifecycle startup hooks and setups database connections

request_flow.desc: User triggers action in web browser
React triggers async fetch request to API
API gateway routes request to application controller
Executes transaction calculations and validation rules
SQLAlchemy ORM writes records to PostgreSQL
Returns status payload back to user

inference_flow.desc: User prompt kickoff call is received by Agent team executor
Combines system role parameters with conversation context
Calls OpenAI GPT-4o model endpoint for reasoning decision
Queries Chroma Vector database for relevant context chunk
Invokes search tools or code interpreters if model requested it
Extracts structured JSON content to satisfy crew tasks goals

worker_flow.desc: RabbitMQ or Redis broker receives task task_id
Worker thread picks up task from queue for processing
Imports service methods and processes task data
Saves task execution outcome to database cache

scheduler_flow.desc: Cron triggers background periodic execution timer
Dispatches asynchronous task payload to broker execution queue

shutdown_flow.description: Terminates open connections in engine pool
Completes active threads and shuts down process context

critical_paths: React -> FastAPI -> Controller -> Service -> Database -> Response
User -> CrewAI -> Agent -> Task -> OpenAI LLM -> VectorDB -> Tool -> Response
